sourceRef.citation: Dr. Abdul Rahim Changezi,Dr. Mohammad Yousuf,Mamoon Khan et al. 2026

statement.en: AURAT MARCH: PERSPECTIVES, PROSPECTS AND PROPOSALS CASE STUDY OF BALOCHISTAN

proposer: Dr. Abdul Rahim Changezi,Dr. Mohammad Yousuf,Mamoon Khan

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The axiom presents a case study of a social movement (Aurat March in Balochistan) with empirical observations, qualitative analysis, and policy proposals. These are provisional findings pending peer validation, field verification, and longitudinal data confirmation. The document addresses lived experiences and institutional structures that evolve over time.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 声は沈黙の重みに逆らうとき、無限の力となる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 根から声が立ち上り、多くの方向へ枝分かれし、地に足をつけながら天へ向かう。
